preReview.title: Atlanta United v New York City FC: Deila plans to make former side 'suffer'
preReview.description: Atlanta United coach Ronny Deila is readying himself for a reunion with New York City FC, who he guided to MLS Cup glory.

QAData.question: Who won between Atlanta United and New York City FC on Sat, 29 Mar 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Atlanta United won 4–3 over New York City FC on Sat, 29 Mar 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
